name: ComicDeck
subtitle: ComicDeck official AltStore source.
description:
This is the official AltStore source for ComicDeck.

Read comics from installed sources, manage offline downloads, and keep your library in sync.

apps.subtitle: SwiftUI comic reader with source browsing, offline downloads, and tracking.
